name: golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev
title: golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev
description:
mocking framework for Go
oglemock is a mocking framework for the Go programming language with the
following features:
.
* An extensive and extensible set of matchers for expressing call
expectations (provided by the oglematchers package).
* Clean, readable output that tells you exactly what you need to know.
* Style and semantics similar to Google Mock and Google JS Test.
* Seamless integration with the ogletest unit testing framework.
.
It can be integrated into any testing framework (including Go's testing
package), but out of the box support is built in to ogletest and that is the
easiest place to use it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev because mocking framework for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jacobsa-oglemock-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
